title: Magician Path
description: Lightweight magical adventure rpg modpack. Explore the full potential of Iron’s Spells and Spellbooks with this modpack.
body:
✨Magic Modpack based on Iron’s Spells & Spellbooks

A modpack focused on magic and spellcasting, built around Iron’s Spells & Spellbooks. Discover and learn new spells, progress as a mage, and face powerful enemies in dungeons and the open world. This modpack was created with the idea of ​​elevating mages. Most modpackers that add the mage class immediately begin to cut them and make them weaker because magic is clearly too powerful. In this build, magic is fully realized. With lots of quests that will help you explore new magical world if you are unfamiliar with it.

🪄Features:

- Core magic system with spellbooks and scrolls.

- There is also a leveling tree synchronized with the iron's mod.

- New dungeons, bosses, and challenges.

- "Balanced" survival with added mystical elements.

- Extra mobs, structures, and items for exploration.

🔮For players who:

- Enjoy RPG mechanics and character growth.

- Want to master magic and spell customization.

- Love exploring, finding artifacts, and using them in combat.

🧙‍♂️If you find any bugs or have any ideas on how to improve the modpack, please write about them on the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/zxFBvFnuqQ)
